opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't been to the toilet in a week, my stomach is tight as a drum, and I feel like I'm going to vomit.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been building up for days and now the bloating and the sick feeling are so bad I couldn't wait until my usual doctor was open.

symptom_narrative.onset: my bowels have been sluggish for a while, but I haven't been able to go at all for the last 7 days
symptom_narrative.duration: 7 days with no bowel motion and I don't think I've passed any wind either
symptom_narrative.character: before this I was passing hard, dry, lumpy little pellets and really straining, and it always felt like I hadn't finished
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the bloating and discomfort are severe — my belly feels rock hard and swollen
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my belly, it feels stretched and tight everywhere
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: getting steadily worse over the week
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps building the longer I go without opening my bowels
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel bloated and full after only a few mouthfuls, my appetite is gone, and I feel a bit sick, but I haven't actually vomited
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've been constipated on and off for a while but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm uncomfortable sitting down and I'm only moving around slowly

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing back pain that I take painkillers for
I've been constipated on and off for a long time

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I'm not very active and I know my diet isn't great

objective_data_offered.value: abdomen looks visibly swollen and distended; patient keeps rubbing her belly and shifting uncomfortably
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance only over video — cannot assess tenderness, guarding or the nature of any mass
self-reported single reading on a home scale

objective_data_offered.value: no bowel motion and no wind for 7 days
